nasb.text: Make sure that your character is free from the love of money, being content with what you have; for He Himself has said, “I will never desert you, nor will I ever forsake you,”

esv.text: Keep your life free from love of money, and be content with what you have, for he has said, “I will never leave you nor forsake you.”

cnv.text: 你們為人不要貪愛錢財，要以現在所有的為滿足；因為　神親自說過：“我決不撇下你，也不離棄你。”

ccb.text: 不要贪爱钱财，要对自己拥有的知足，因为上帝说过： “我永不撇下你，也不离弃你。”

csbs.text: 你们行事为人不要爱钱财，要以现有的为满足，因为神自己说过：“我绝不撇下你，也绝不离弃你。”
